ddls:
CREATE TABLE "expenditure_distribution" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each record */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the expenditure distribution data */,
  "category_1_pct" REAL /* Percentage of expenditure in Category 1 */,
  "category_2_pct" REAL /* Percentage of expenditure in Category 2 */,
  "category_3_pct" REAL /* Percentage of expenditure in Category 3 */,
  "category_4_pct" REAL /* Percentage of expenditure in Category 4 */,
  "category_5_pct" REAL /* Percentage of expenditure in Category 5 */,
  "category_6_pct" REAL /* Percentage of expenditure in Category 6 */,
  "total_expenditure" TEXT /* Total healthcare expenditure for the year */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for record creation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for last record update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expenditure_distribution_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expenditure_distribution_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "expenditure_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "subcategory" TEXT /* Subcategory within the main category */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the category is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year_name" TEXT /* Year for which expenditure data is recorded */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the fiscal year */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the fiscal year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the year for which data was accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., trend analysis, comparison) */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* File path to the report data */,
  "generation_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published) */,
  "shared_with" TEXT /* JSON field storing user IDs with whom the report is shared */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL to access the data source */,
  "update_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of updates to the data source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)
